meta_title: AI Website Builder — Create a Website in 2 Minutes | Promto
meta_description: AI website builder by Promto. Describe your business to the neural network — and get a ready website in 2 minutes. No code, no skills, no designer.
og_description: Promto AI website builder: describe your business to the neural network — get a ready website in 2 minutes. A new level of website creation.
hero_subtitle: The neural network creates a ready website in 2 minutes from your description. No code, no designer — just describe your business.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website you want to create...

advantages.title: Generation in 2 Minutes
advantages.description: AI instantly analyzes your description and creates a complete website with texts and design.

advantages.title: Copy Written by Neural Network
advantages.description: No need to come up with sales copy yourself — AI generates compelling descriptions and headlines.

advantages.title: Intelligent Design
advantages.description: AI selects the style, colors, and layout specifically for your niche and audience.

advantages.title: No Code or Programmers
advantages.description: No HTML, CSS, or JavaScript needed. AI handles all the technical work for you.

advantages.title: Ready to Publish
advantages.description: The website works on the internet immediately: hosting, SSL, mobile responsive — all included.

advantages.title: AI-Powered SEO
advantages.description: The neural network optimizes the website for search engines: meta tags, heading structure, loading speed.

how_it_works.title: Write About Your Business
how_it_works.description: Describe what you do, who your product is for, what services you offer. No need to think about structure.

how_it_works.title: AI Generates the Website
how_it_works.description: The neural network analyzes your description and creates the website: structure, texts, design, and images.

how_it_works.title: Refine
how_it_works.description: Edit texts, add photos, change colors — all through a simple visual editor.

how_it_works.title: Publish
how_it_works.description: Click the button — the website is already live. Share the link or connect advertising.

faq.question: What does AI website builder mean?
faq.answer: An AI website builder uses artificial intelligence to create websites. Instead of manually assembling from blocks, you describe the task in text, and the neural network generates a ready website.

faq.question: How is an AI builder better than a regular one?
faq.answer: A regular builder requires you to assemble pages from elements yourself. An AI builder creates the structure, writes copy, and selects design — you only need to describe the task.

faq.question: Do I need experience working with AI?
faq.answer: No. No special skills are needed. Just write about your business in Russian — AI will understand and create the website.

faq.question: What kind of websites can AI create?
faq.answer: Landing pages, service websites, portfolios, sites for restaurants, salons, workshops, agencies, and any other directions.

faq.question: Can I edit the result?
faq.answer: Yes. After generation, you can change any element: texts, images, blocks, colors, and section order.

faq.question: How fast does the AI builder work?
faq.answer: The website is generated in 2 minutes. That's dozens of times faster than manual work or hiring a freelancer.

cta_mid_subtitle: Describe your business — and the neural network creates a website in 2 minutes. Free.
cta_final_subtitle: The neural network does all the work. You just need to publish the ready website.
